SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ApiKeyFilter
HTTP filter that validates the X-API-Key request header.
AppConfig
 
BaseDocumentAdapter
 
ChatService
 
ChatService.ChatResponse
 
Chunk
Represents a chunk of text extracted from a document.
CsvAdapter
 
DocumentAdapter
Interface for adapting different document formats into chunks.
EmbeddingService
Interface for converting text into numerical vector representations (embeddings).
EmbeddingServiceImpl
 
EvalController
REST controller for running RAG quality evaluations.
EvalQuestion
Represents a single question/answer pair in the RAG evaluation test set.
EvalReport
Aggregated evaluation report summarizing the RAG system's performance across all test questions.
EvalResult
Holds the evaluation result for a single question, including retrieval and answer metrics.
EvalService
Evaluation service that measures the quality of the RAG pipeline.
GeneralAdapter
 
HtmlAdapter
 
InMemoryVectorStore
In-memory implementation of VectorStore.
JsonAdapter
 
LegalSplitter
Splits legal document text into chunks by section or article headings.
LegalTextCleaner
Cleans raw text extracted from legal documents such as California rental law files.
LlmReranker
Re-ranks candidate chunks using a single LLM call.
MarkdownAdapter
 
RagController
REST controller for the RAG Core Engine.
RagCoreApplication
Entry point for the RAG Core Engine application.
RagOrchestrator
Central coordinator of the RAG pipeline.
RentalLawAdapter
 
Reranker
Interface for re-ranking a list of candidate chunks by relevance to a query.
ScriptAdapter
 
ScriptSplitter
Splits screenplay text into chunks by scene headings (INT./EXT.).
ScriptTextCleaner
Cleans raw text extracted from screenplay files.
SQLiteVectorStore
SQLite-backed implementation of VectorStore.
StoryboardAdapter
Implements DocumentAdapter for storyboard scripts.
SubtitleAdapter
 
TextCleaner
Utility class that cleans raw text extracted from PDF or other documents.
TextSplitter
Splits long text into smaller chunks with configurable size and overlap.
VectorStore
Interface for storing and searching document chunks by vector similarity.
